underlying_goal: Deploy and improve stock dashboard, fix homepage UI issues, and set up additional infrastructure (file browser) on Hetzner server
friction_detail: Claude installed filebrowser with /srv mount instead of root filesystem, missed adding new services to homepage during deployment, and initially used wrong icon format (mdi: instead of mdi-)
brief_summary: User wanted to deploy stock dashboard updates, fix homepage UI/icons, and install a file browser; all goals achieved though several follow-up corrections were needed.
